creator: hostmaster@GTS.NET
text:
after upgrading to 12.2 stable, gcc9 port faild to compile
recompiling gmp without assembler opts fixed it - other ports also ask for assembler opts, so they might need to be checked as well

uname: FreeBSD schure-gw2 12.2-STABLE FreeBSD 12.2-STABLE r368820 SCHURE-VM  amd64

error: /misc/var/ports/usr/ports/lang/gcc9/work/gcc-9.3.0/libgcc/libgcc2.h:256:16: internal compiler error: Illegal instruction   256 | #define __N(a) __ ## a

system: Dell PowerEdge R240

CPU: Intel(R) Celeron(R) G4930 CPU @ 3.20GHz (3192.18-MHz K8-class CPU)
  Origin="GenuineIntel"  Id=0x906eb  Family=0x6  Model=0x9e  Stepping=11
  Features=0xbfebfbff<FPU,VME,DE,PSE,TSC,MSR,PAE,MCE,CX8,APIC,SEP,MTRR,PGE,MCA,CMOV,PAT,PSE36,CLFLUSH,DTS,ACPI,MMX,FXSR,SSE,SSE2,SS,HTT,TM,PBE>
  Features2=0x4ffaebbf<SSE3,PCLMULQDQ,DTES64,MON,DS_CPL,VMX,EST,TM2,SSSE3,SDBG,CX16,xTPR,PDCM,PCID,SSE4.1,SSE4.2,x2APIC,MOVBE,POPCNT,TSCDLT,AESNI,XSAVE,OSXSAVE,RDRAND>
  AMD Features=0x2c100800<SYSCALL,NX,Page1GB,RDTSCP,LM>
  AMD Features2=0x121<LAHF,ABM,Prefetch>
  Structured Extended Features=0x2946683<FSGSBASE,TSCADJ,SMEP,ERMS,INVPCID,NFPUSG,MPX,RDSEED,SMAP,CLFLUSHOPT,PROCTRACE>
  Structured Extended Features3=0x9c002600<MCUOPT,MD_CLEAR,TSXFA,IBPB,STIBP,L1DFL,SSBD>
  XSAVE Features=0xf<XSAVEOPT,XSAVEC,XINUSE,XSAVES>
  VT-x: PAT,HLT,MTF,PAUSE,EPT,UG,VPID
  TSC: P-state invariant, performance statistics
